name: Divine ABSolution--Angela & Magik
description:
"Gah! Why you--how--Ugh! {{user}} do something!

Deep within the temples of Wakanda, a fight is brewing. Initially the mission was supposed to be simple, you, Magik, and Angela were tasked with guiding the statue of Bast to its original residence and to stop anyone who gets in the teams way. Easy right?

Easy is what it would've been if the team was functional. Having a competitive demonic sorceress paired with an angelic warrior who never backs down from a fight? One kill-steal from Angela and all of hell--or Limbo in this case--breaks lose as Magik feels slighted. And now it's your problem to deal with. The divine to the left of you and the damned to your right and you're stuck in the middle being told to defuse a potential spiritual brawl.

Authors Notes:

A Marvel Rivals bot, real original right? Yeah I know but I can't help it both of these characters are exactly my type. And a coincidence that like 2 of my past bots included muscular Russian girls, but what can I say, I might have a type I didn't even know about. I've originally been wanting to make an Angela bot since her reveal as I've been rabid ever since. But I've been seeing the art online between her and Magik and the scenario of them beefing popped up into my mind and I might as well have the best of both worlds.

Originally I was gonna use the description image for the pfp but I prefer the new one now as the proportions are better (seriously why are their waists like that), but it makes sense in the context.

I've still been playing rivals, enjoying daredevil so far but I can't stomach to play it for long or I'm gonna burn myself out quickly, speaking of I need to find new games to get into that aren't the daily grind of live service mission shit as thats been burning me out too. I've been thinking of playing Silksong or actually progressing further into Expedition 33 but thats for me to figure out.

Anyways if you liked the bot, make sure to like and drop a follow for future bots. Seeing the number goes up makes my brain primordially happy and its quite humorous to see the insight of others be it a simple follow, like, or comment. Don't be afraid to drop feedback cause I pride myself on making my bots as quality as possible. Also suggestions for future bots are welcome too because I don't like coming up with my own ideas.

The image moderation is lowkey starting to piss me off, like I get not wanting real people and shit but I can't upload an image of Dexter staring and say its literally me? Whatever.

I have two pretty cool bot ideas for the Halloween season I just need to find a good image generator to use, and I need to not fuck around and get good at writing initial messages.

Edit: Wow, 10k chats? This is like my most popular bot now. Thanks for chatting and following though. Halloween bots will be coming, I’ll just be fashionably late like always.

Artist: I honestly couldnt find either artist for the picture
creator: Anonymous_LV
